rows.result: Abandoned settlement — collapsed palisade, silent hearths, and the lingering smell of smoke
Ancient barrow — turf-covered burial mound; iron-bound door ajar
Blighted grove — trees twisted and blackened at the heart; animals avoid it
Broken bridge — spans a gorge; far side is uncertain
Cave complex — deep, echoing, with cold water dripping somewhere within
Fortified camp — rough earthworks, torchlight, the smell of cook-fires and tension
Frozen lake — cracked ice; something dark moves beneath
Hidden shrine — moss-covered stones arranged in an old pattern; offerings left recently
Iron-vein cliff face — raw ore seams exposed by rockfall; valuable and contested
Lone tower — partially collapsed, high enough to survey several leagues; occupied or not?
Mountain pass — narrow, icy, exposed; the only route for fifty leagues
River ford — knee-deep in summer, deadly in spring melt; a crossing everyone needs
Ruined hall — great oak beams rotted through; carvings on the stone pillars still legible
Seaside village — a dozen salt-weathered longhouses, a smoking kiln, wary eyes on the horizon
Sunken road — an old trade route, half-swallowed by bog; still used by those who know it
Waystation — a low turf hut at a trail junction; firewood stacked, traveller's mark carved in the door
Wrecked longship — beached and broken; the cargo may still be aboard
